# All In One Calculator

Welcome to All In One Calculator (https://www.allinonecalculator.fun), a comprehensive repository of fast, accurate, and free online calculators. The calculators run client-side in the user's browser, requiring no registration, fees, or account creation.

This document serves as an LLM-friendly directory of all available calculation tools, grouped by category, including their metadata, primary keywords, and synonym search keywords.

## Categories & Calculators

### Finance & Business Calculators

#### Mortgage Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/mortgage-calculator
- **Description**: Use our free mortgage calculator to estimate your monthly payment, mortgage insurance, and amortization. Compare options like a biweekly mortgage, recast scenarios, or mobile home financing.
- **Primary Keyword**: mortgage calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: reverse mortgage calculator, dave ramsey mortgage calculator, mortgage calculator games, mortgage calculator nc, mortgage recast calculator, mortgage calculator colorado, mortgage calculator ga, mortgage calculator ma, recast mortgage calculator, mobile home mortgage calculator, mortgage calculator oregon, dave ramsey mortgage payoff calculator, mortgage calculator ramsey, mortgage calculator sc, mortgage calculator wi, mortgage insurance calculator, calculate reverse mortgage, manufactured home mortgage calculator, mortgage calculator ct, mortgage calculator georgia, mortgage calculator idaho, mortgage calculator oklahoma, mortgage calculator wisconsin, biweekly mortgage calculator, mortgage calculator alabama, mortgage calculator arkansas, mortgage calculator dave ramsey, mortgage calculator washington state, reverse mortgage calculator without personal information
- **State-Specific Sub-Calculators**:
  - [Idaho Mortgage Calculator](https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/mortgage-calculator/idaho): Estimate your monthly mortgage payments in Idaho with local property taxes.
  - [Montana Mortgage Calculator](https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/mortgage-calculator/montana): Estimate your monthly mortgage payments in Montana with local property taxes.
  - [Nebraska Mortgage Calculator](https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/mortgage-calculator/nebraska): Estimate your monthly mortgage payments in Nebraska with local property taxes.
  - [Alaska Mortgage Calculator](https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/mortgage-calculator/alaska): Estimate your monthly mortgage payments in Alaska with local property taxes.

#### Reverse Mortgage Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/reverse-mortgage-calculator
- **Description**: Use our free reverse mortgage calculator without personal information to calculate reverse mortgage payouts, jumbo loan limits, and FHA requirements.
- **Primary Keyword**: reverse mortgage calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: reverse mortgage calculator, calculate reverse mortgage, reverse mortgage calculator without personal information, reverse mortgage loan calculation, free reverse mortgage calculator, reverse mortgage calculator no personal information, reverse mortgage calculators, calculating reverse mortgage, jumbo reverse mortgage calculator, reverse mortgage calculator no personal info, reverse mortgage payment calculator, reverse mortgages calculator, mortgage reverse calculator, reverse mortgage loan calculator, reverse mortgage purchase calculator, reverse mortgage purchase down payment calculator, calculator for reverse mortgage, calculate a reverse mortgage, calculator reverse mortgage, fha reverse mortgage calculator, mortgage calculator reverse, reverse mortgage amortization calculator

#### Loan Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/loan-calculator
- **Description**: Free online loan calculator. Estimate monthly payments and interest for farm loans, bridge loans, equipment financing, or credit union loans.
- **Primary Keyword**: loan calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: mobile home loan calculator, farm loan calculator, myusfinance personal loan calculator, bridge loan calculator, equipment loan calculator, fico loan savings calculator, hard money loan calculator, myusfinance loan calculator, tsp loan calculator, car loan calculator refinance, maryland mortgage loan calculator, parent plus loan calculator, reverse mortgage loan calculation, manufactured home loan calculator, arm loan calculator, car loan calculator suncoast, credit union loan calculator, loan recast calculator, sba loan payment calculator

#### Retirement Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/retirement-calculator
- **Description**: Use our free retirement calculator to find out how long your retirement savings will last. Calculate withdrawals, distributions, and required income.
- **Primary Keyword**: retirement calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: dave ramsey retirement calculator, retirement withdrawal calculator, trs retirement calculator, how long will my retirement savings last calculator, how long will retirement savings last calculator, retirement calculator dave ramsey, retirement calculator fers employees, myusfinance retirement calculator, retirement distribution calculator, calstrs retirement calculator, how long will my money last in retirement calculator, reserve retirement calculator, retirement drawdown calculator, taxes on retirement income calculator, teacher retirement calculator, dave ramsey calculator retirement, edward jones retirement calculator, fers calculator retirement, tsp retirement calculator, federal retirement calculator fers, psers retirement calculator

#### Debt Payoff Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/debt-payoff-calculator
- **Description**: Free debt payoff calculator. Easily calculate your debt snowball payoff plan without an excel or google sheets spreadsheet. Track your credit card debt payoff strategy.
- **Primary Keyword**: debt payoff calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: credit card debt calculator payoff, debt payoff calculator excel, dave ramsey debt payoff calculator, debt payoff calculator google sheets, debt payoff snowball calculator spreadsheet, ramit debt payoff calculator, ramit sethi debt payoff calculator, ramsey debt payoff calculator, debt payoff calculator ramit, debt snowball payoff calculator, debt payoff calculator dave ramsey, debt payoff calculator spreadsheet, debt payoff snowball calculator

#### Mortgage Recast Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/mortgage-recast-calculator
- **Description**: Free mortgage recast calculator with amortization. Recasting a mortgage lowers your monthly payment without refinancing. See your exact savings instantly.
- **Primary Keyword**: mortgage recast calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: mortgage recast calculator, recast mortgage calculator, recasting mortgage calculator, mortgage recasting calculator, recast calculator mortgage, mortgage loan recast calculator, recast mortgage payment calculator, mortgage recast calculator with amortization, mortgage calculator recast, free mortgage recast calculator, mortgage recast calculator bankrate, mortgage recast calculator excel, mortgage recast calculator free, recasting a mortgage calculator, mortgage recast payment calculator, best mortgage recast calculator

#### Compound Interest Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/compound-interest-calculator
- **Description**: Free compound interest calculator. Calculate how much your investments, CDs, and dividends will grow over time with withdrawals or increasing contributions.
- **Primary Keyword**: compound interest calculator

#### Cap Rate Calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: cap rate calculator

#### Freelance Hourly Rate Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/freelance-hourly-rate-calculator

#### Etsy & Shopify Fee Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/ecommerce-fee-calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: etsy fee calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: etsy fee calculator, shopify fee calculator, ecommerce profit calculator, etsy transaction fee calculator, copart fee calculator, copart fees calculator, michigan registration fee calculator, stripe fee calculator, cash app fee calculator, ebay fee calculator 2025, fba fee calculator, florida vehicle registration fee calculator, square fee calculator, va funding fee calculator, venmo fee calculator

#### Stripe & PayPal Fee Calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: stripe fee calculator

#### YouTube & TikTok Revenue Calculator

### Math & Time Calculators

- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: percentage calculator, percent calculator, percentage change calculator, how to calculate percentage

- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/age-calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: age calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: age calculator, how old am I calculator, birthday calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: fraction calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: fraction calculator, adding fractions calculator, multiplying fractions calculator, mixed fraction calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: scientific calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: scientific calculator, online calculator, math calculator, trigonometry calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: root calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: root calculator, square root calculator, cube root calculator, nth root calculator

#### Factorial Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/factorial-calculator
- **Description**: Free factorial calculator. Calculate the factorial of any non-negative integer quickly and easily.
- **Primary Keyword**: factorial calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: factorial calculator, n factorial calculator, math calculator

#### Time Duration Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/time-duration-calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: time duration calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: date difference calculator

### Health & Fitness Calculators

#### BMI Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/bmi-calculator
- **Description**: Free BMI calculator for men, women, and children. Calculate your Body Mass Index and see your healthy weight range.
- **Primary Keyword**: bmi calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: bmi calculator, body mass index calculator, bmi calculator for women, bmi chart

#### Calorie Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/calorie-calculator
- **Description**: Free daily calorie calculator. Estimate how many calories you need to eat to maintain, lose, or gain weight based on your BMR and activity level.
- **Primary Keyword**: calorie calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: calorie calculator, daily calorie calculator, maintenance calories, calories for weight loss, bmr calorie calculator

#### TDEE Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/tdee-calculator
- **Description**: Calculate your TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure) and get personalized macronutrient splits for bulking, cutting, or maintaining weight.
- **Primary Keyword**: tdee calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: tdee calculator, total daily energy expenditure, macro calculator, cutting macros

#### Ideal Weight Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/ideal-weight-calculator
- **Description**: Free ideal weight calculator based on height, gender, and age. Uses multiple formulas including Robinson, Miller, Devine, and Hamwi.
- **Primary Keyword**: ideal weight calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: ideal weight calculator, healthy weight range, what should I weigh, ideal body weight

#### Body Fat Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/body-fat-calculator
- **Description**: Calculate your body fat percentage using the U.S. Navy method. Find out your lean mass and fat mass based on simple body measurements.
- **Primary Keyword**: body fat calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: body fat calculator, navy body fat calculator, body fat percentage calculator, lean body mass calculator

#### Pregnancy Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/pregnancy-calculator
- **Description**: Free pregnancy due date calculator. Calculate your estimated due date, conception date, and current gestational age based on LMP, ultrasound, or IVF.
- **Primary Keyword**: pregnancy calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: pregnancy calculator, due date calculator, conception calculator, ivf due date calculator, gestational age calculator

#### Dog & Cat Age Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/pet-age-calculator
- **Description**: Free pet age calculator. Convert your dog or cat's age into human years instantly. Uses veterinarian-approved formulas based on dog size and breed.
- **Primary Keyword**: dog age calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: dog age calculator, cat age calculator, dog years to human years, cat years to human years, pet age converter

#### Blood Alcohol Content (BAC) Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/bac-calculator
- **Description**: Free BAC calculator. Estimate your blood alcohol content and find out how long it will take to become sober based on your weight and drinks consumed.
- **Primary Keyword**: bac calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: bac calculator, blood alcohol calculator, how long to get sober calculator, legal driving limit calculator

#### Keto Macros Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/keto-macros-calculator
- **Description**: Free keto macros calculator. Calculate your exact daily requirements for fat, protein, and net carbs to enter ketosis and lose weight fast.
- **Primary Keyword**: keto macros calculator

#### Ovulation & Fertility Calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: running pace calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: length converter
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: length converter, miles to kilometers, inches to centimeters, feet to meters

- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/weight-converter
- **Description**: Free online weight and mass converter. Instantly convert between pounds, kilograms, ounces, grams, stones, and more.
- **Primary Keyword**: weight converter
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: weight converter, lbs to kg, pounds to kilograms, ounces to grams

#### Temperature Converter
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/temperature-converter
- **Description**: Free online temperature converter. Convert easily between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin.
- **Primary Keyword**: temperature converter
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: temperature converter, celsius to fahrenheit, fahrenheit to celsius, kelvin converter

#### Area Converter
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/area-converter

- **Primary Keyword**: area converter
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: area converter, acres to square feet, hectares to acres, square meters converter

#### Volume Converter
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/volume-converter
- **Description**: Free online volume converter. Instantly convert between liters, gallons, milliliters, cups, quarts, and fluid ounces.
- **Primary Keyword**: volume converter
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: volume converter, liters to gallons, milliliters to cups, fluid ounces converter

#### EV Charging Cost Calculator

- **Primary Keyword**: ev charging cost calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: ev charging cost calculator, how much does it cost to charge a tesla, home charging vs supercharging cost

### Home & Everyday Calculators

#### Flooring Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/flooring-calculator
- **Description**: Free flooring calculator. Calculate the square footage of your room, add waste percentage, and estimate the total cost for hardwood, laminate, or tile.
- **Primary Keyword**: flooring calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: flooring calculator, square footage calculator, tile calculator, laminate flooring calculator

#### Painting Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/painting-calculator
- **Description**: Free paint calculator. Estimate exactly how many gallons of paint you need for your room based on dimensions, doors, and windows.
- **Primary Keyword**: paint calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: paint calculator, painting calculator, how much paint do I need, gallons of paint per room

#### Electricity Bill Calculator
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/electricity-bill-calculator
- **Description**: Free electricity bill calculator. Estimate the daily, monthly, and yearly cost of running any home appliance based on its wattage and your electricity rates.
- **Primary Keyword**: electricity bill calculator
- **Keywords / Search Synonyms**: electricity bill calculator, appliance cost calculator, kWh calculator, energy cost calculator

### How to Calculate Your Exact Take-Home Pay in 2024

- **Related Tools**: salary-calculator, percentage-calculator

### Understanding the 50/30/20 Budgeting Rule
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/blog/understanding-the-50-30-20-budgeting-rule
- **Description**: Learn how to apply the popular 50/30/20 budgeting rule to your net income to build wealth, pay off debt, and enjoy life.
- **Related Tools**: salary-calculator, debt-payoff-calculator, retirement-calculator, compound-interest-calculator

### BMI vs Body Fat Percentage: Which is a Better Metric?
- **URL**: https://www.allinonecalculator.fun/blog/bmi-vs-body-fat-percentage-which-is-better
- **Description**: Is BMI outdated? Discover the differences between Body Mass Index and Body Fat Percentage, and find out which health metric you should actually be tracking.
- **Related Tools**: bmi-calculator, body-fat-calculator, tdee-calculator, ideal-weight-calculator
